title: Rod of Discord
description: Introduce the Terraria Rod of Discord into Minecraft !
body: **Rod of Discord: Teleportation at Your Fingertips!** Tired of painstakingly bridging over ravines or being cornered by a creeper? The **Rod of Discord** brings a touch of chaotic teleportation from Terraria into your Minecraft world, allowing you to warp out of danger or navigate tricky terrain with ease! --- ### ✨ What's New? * **The Rod of Discord Arrives:** Introducing the legendary Rod of Discord, a powerful magical item that grants you the ability to teleport short distances instantly. Evade enemies, cross gaps, or simply surprise your friends with this incredible utility! * **Instant Teleportation:** Right-click to instantly warp to where you're looking. This quick movement is perfect for quick escapes, precise positioning, or just having fun with spontaneous travel. * **Master the Chaos:** While powerful, the Rod of Discord isn't without its quirks. Rapid, **consecutive teleportations** will inflict a large amount of damage, known as "Chaos". Master its rhythm to become a true teleportation expert without overexerting yourself! * **Mysterious Origins & Latent Power:** The Rod of Discord is a rare and valuable find. Discover its secrets through exploration and combat in the deepest, darkest corners of your Minecraft world. Legend has it that defeating powerful foes and bosses might just **unlock its true, unbridled potential...** --- ### Why This Mod? If you've ever wished for a fast, on-demand way to traverse your Minecraft world or escape perilous situations, the Rod of Discord is your answer. Embrace the chaos and unlock new possibilities for exploration and survival! --- ### ⚙️ How to Install: * Make sure you have [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) installed. * This mod is built for Minecraft **1.21.5**. * Download the `.jar` file and place it into your Minecraft `mods` folder.
